name: miniweb-telegram-platform
description: Telegram-first mini web platform with VIP, admin panel, and all-content search.

scripts.check: node --check apps/web/server.js && node --check apps/web/public/app.js && node --check apps/web/public/admin.js && node --check apps/bot/bot.js && node --check apps/bot/src/config.js && node --check apps/bot/src/handlers.js && node --check apps/bot/src/keyboards.js && node --check apps/bot/src/telegram-api.js && node --check apps/bot/src/data/catalog.js
